exp_002_token_pruning.quality_scoring_function: quality_score = candidate_accuracy * benchmark_adjustment; benchmark_adjustment = 0.985 + 0.015 * (0.70 * mean(retained_salience * salience_mass) + 0.30 * mean(context_coverage)); retained_salience = 1 - pruning_ratio * (0.55 + 0.30 * difficulty_weight); context_coverage = 1 - pruning_ratio * (0.45 + 0.20 * rare_token_density)

exp_006_token_pruning_threshold_sweep.quality_scoring_function: quality_score = candidate_accuracy * benchmark_adjustment; benchmark_adjustment = 0.985 + 0.015 * (0.70 * mean(retained_salience * salience_mass) + 0.30 * mean(context_coverage)); retained_salience = 1 - pruning_ratio * (0.55 + 0.30 * difficulty_weight); context_coverage = 1 - pruning_ratio * (0.45 + 0.20 * rare_token_density)

exp_004_compiler_fusion.quality_scoring_function: quality_score = candidate_accuracy * benchmark_adjustment; benchmark_adjustment = mean(1 - fusion_ratio * 0.00035 * checksum_sensitivity * log2(kernel_count + 1)) with a small launch-overhead bonus and cap in [0.995, 1.001]

variance_reduction_protocol.run_isolation_policy: gc.collect + tracemalloc reset + deterministic state rebuild per window
variance_reduction_protocol.outlier_handling_policy: median-centered MAD filter, keep windows with |x-median| <= 3*MAD

skeptic_notes: High variance in ECD improvement suggests instability.
